历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 15313→17815→17605→49746→37146, in 2024 due to abnormal low scores in Architecture (about 49746th), in 2025 rebounded to about 37146th; overall trend of backward movement in recent 5 years, in 2025 moved back about 21833 places compared to 2021; enrollment plan in Hunan Physics Category was 57 in 2021–2022, 54 in 2023, 64 in 2024, increased to 76 in 2025; 2026 plan 72, a slight reduction of about 5.3% from 2025, expansion trend temporarily halted.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 about 107th, recent years stable in 103–109 range, belongs to upper-middle 211 level; school's Douyin popularity total ranking 93rd (average), once ranked 14th in 2022 (high heat), popularity has declined in recent years; no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal filing records in reputation documents, overall reputation stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Electrical Engineering and Automation (high heat recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (high heat recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other engineering majors continue to rise in social heat, matching the school's advantageous directions; Hunan Province 2026 Physics Category candidates about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from about 320,000 in 2025, competition further intensifies; main campus of Hebei University of Technology located in Tianjin, not a provincial university, no special regional preference in Hunan; enrollment proportion in Hunan about 0.5%–1%, medium scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as 2025 baseline ranking about 37146th, slight reduction in 2026 plan (76→72), and significant increase in Hunan Physics Category candidates (+8.4%), the contraction effect and candidate increase effect offset each other, but the candidate scale increase is larger, expected competition slightly intensifies; predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking about 36172nd, range 35672–36672nd.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3916→4215→5083→4455→3479, peaking at 5083 in 2023, then continuously recovering in 2024–2025, with 2025 at about 3479 being the best level in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 3 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 6 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and reduced to 2 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 2 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 107th in the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; stable reputation, average popularity on Douyin, with no negative public opinion or abnormal admission records.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The only major offered in History Category is Law (the sole major in 2025), with social popularity rated as recommended (relatively hot), leading to high application enthusiasm; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.2% from approximately 143,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Tianjin, with no special regional preference in Hunan Province, and its enrollment share is extremely small (about 0.1%).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 3479, the 2026 plan unchanged (2 students), and the substantial increase in History Category examinees in Hunan Province (+31.2%), the surge in examinee numbers will significantly raise competition intensity; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category is about 3579, with a range of 3079–4079.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The university only offers the Law major for History Category in Hunan Province (2026 plan: 2 students). Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 3079–4079 may consider applying; due to the extremely small enrollment number, ranking fluctuations pose higher risks, so it is recommended to also prepare other universities as backups.
